name: browser_upload_file
description: Upload a file to a file input element. Use this when you need to attach or upload files through a file input (<input type="file">) on the page.

element.description: Human-readable element description used to obtain permission to interact with the element

ref.description: Exact target element reference from the page snapshot. Must be a file input element.

filePath.description: Absolute path to the file to upload

viewId.description: Target browser tab ID. If omitted, uses the last interacted tab.
